## Summary

-

## Related issue

Closes #

## Change type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation or translation
- [ ] Refactor or maintenance
- [ ] Breaking change

## Validation

- Mark checks that apply and explain skipped checks below.
- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo check --workspace --all-targets --features semantic`
- [ ] `cargo test -p aidememo-core --features semantic`
- [ ] `cargo test -p aidememo-cli --bin aidememo`
- [ ] `npm --prefix website run build`
- [ ] Binding/package smoke relevant to this change

## Review checklist

- [ ] Tests cover the behavior change or the PR explains why none are needed.
- [ ] Public API, CLI, MCP, config, and migration implications are documented.
- [ ] English and Korean docs are synchronized when translated content changes.
- [ ] Logs, fixtures, and screenshots contain no secrets or private memory data.
- [ ] Release notes identify breaking or registry-visible changes.

## Notes

Mention any skipped checks, registry-release implications, or migration notes.
